description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with ornate, symmetrical blades featuring intricate gold inlays and decorative patterns. The blades are dark metallic with a slightly worn finish, and the central section is adorned with blue gemstones set into a gold framework. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a textured, dark brown grip, and capped with metallic fittings at both ends, including a ring at the base for attachment or display. The axe exhibits a medieval or fantasy aesthetic, with craftsmanship suggesting ceremonial or high-status use. The overall construction appears robust, with a focus on both functionality and elaborate visual appeal.
description: A double-headed, ornate battle axe with gold inlays, blue gemstones, and a textured brown handle capped with metallic fittings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both symmetrical blades, gold inlays, blue gemstones, and the full handle with decorative end cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle, with minimal blade width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same ornate blade design and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and cylindrical handle.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight handle wrapped in textured brown leather, metallic fittings at both ends, with a ring at the base for attachment.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical blades with wide, curved edges, intricate gold inlays, blue gemstone accents, and decorative cutouts.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and pinned mounting with decorative metallic collar at the joint.
